arts.ttl: Roma and Juventus have their own ambitions
arts.sum: Juventus are unbeaten in eight (W4 D4) of their last nine league games against Roma, with the Giallorossi`s only win in that period in the top-flight coming in March 2023 (1-0 at the Olimpico), thanks to Gianluca Mancini’s goal. Roma are unbeaten in eight (W4 D4) of their last 10 Serie A home games against Juventus, finding the net in nine of those games at the Olimpico (16 goals for the Giallorossi in this period).
